description: A minimalist, fixed-position header. Initially, it features a solid Deep Charcoal (bg-background) background with high-contrast Crisp White navigation links. Upon scrolling 20px, it transitions to a bg-background/80 with a heavy backdrop-blur-lg effect. The logo is centered on mobile but left-aligned on desktop, balanced by a 'Book Now' CTA on the right. Navigation links use a subtle 'underline-from-center' hover effect in Champagne Gold.
